articles.title: Shiba Inu ($SHIB) Developer Unveils Key Updates on Shibarium Network
articles.description: Earlier today, Kaal Dhairya, a developer working on the Shiba Inu (SHIB) project, published a blog post to update the community on several important developments. He began by congratulating the ShibArmy for achieving a milestone of one million wallets and nearly one million transactions. Dhairya emphasized that they aim to maintain Shibarium as one of […]

articles.description: The Ripple legal team has pushed back against the Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) request to seek an interlocutory appeal in their ongoing legal fight, arguing that the regulator hasn’t satisfied the...

articles.title: Ripple Files Motion To Oppose SEC Appeal Over Landmark XRP Ruling
articles.description: Ripple is pushing back on the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission’s (SEC) efforts to secure a certification for an immediate appeal on the recent landmark lawsuit ruling that went against the regulator. Last month, Reuters reported that the SEC sought the approval of Judge Analisa Torres to allow an appeals court to review her ruling […]

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Reaches 'Adamantium' Support Level Once Again
articles.description: Cardano has hit important support level it has previously used for retrace

articles.title: Solana Chain Mints Record 15.6M NFTs Amid SEC First Enforcement at NFT
articles.description: In a recent tweet, prominent Chinese reporter Colin Wu spotlighted record-breaking developments surrounding Solana-based non-fungible tokens (NFT). Wu shared that in August, Solana’s ultra-low-cost Compressed NFTs saw a minting volume that exceeded 15.6 million. The Chinese reporter noted that the figure represents the ultra-low-cost Compressed NFTs’ record high. Moreover, Wu disclosed that...

articles.title: Solana (SOL) Ready to Outperform Ethereum (ETH) in Next Market Expansion, According to Chris Burniske
articles.description: A venture capitalist who correctly called the 2022 crypto bottom says that one Ethereum (ETH) rival appears primed to outperform the leading smart contract platform. Chris Burniske, the founder of Placeholder Capital, tells his 263,000 followers on the social media platform X that Solana (SOL) looks poised to outperform the top altcoin during the next […]
